---
# SETTLED — 2026-06-06. Orientation pieces on terrain features.
title: "Primer Name"
type: primer
provenance: ""       # corpus | researched | synthesis
---

*Silhouette: A one-line orientation of the terrain feature.*

<!-- Primers are orientation pieces (e.g. "Structure and Pacing").
     Voice: Light authorial / Mentor. 
     Goal: Dip-in orientation, not an exhaustive essay. -->

## The Terrain

<!-- Reflective prose on the landscape of this concept. -->

::: {.callout-tip}
### Mentor Wisdom
High-level advice on navigating this terrain. [synthesis]
:::

## Key Mechanisms

<!-- Briefly introduce the load-bearing mechanisms of this family, 
     linking to full entries. -->

## Related Exemplars
<!-- Links to real-world works that showcase this family. -->
